data.title: Linkage Global Inc closes $1 million private placement financing, issuing 689,655 Class A shares at $1.45 per share.
data.description: In Tokyo, Japan on December 3, 2025, Linkage Global Inc (NASDAQ: LGCB), a company based in Japan providing cross-border e-commerce integrated services, announced the completion of its private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing. As per the securities purchase agreement dated November 24, 2025, the company successfully issued and sold a total of 689,655 Class A Ordinary Shares at a rate of US$1.45 per share, generating roughly US$1,000,000 in gross proceeds. After deducting fees and offering expenses, the net proceeds will be utilized for general corporate purposes, predominantly to bolster working capital and enhance the Company’s cross-border sales operations.

data.title: Successful conclusion of FASHION SOURCE and SHENZHEN ORIGINAL FASHION WEEK in Shenzhen with 600 invited.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on December 4, 2025, it was reported that the joint effort between FASHION SOURCE and SHENZHEN ORIGINAL FASHION WEEK wrapped up on November 21, 2025, at the Shenzhen Convention and Exhibition Center. This partnership, featuring "1 sourcing exhibition and 1 fashion week," attracted a total of 600 participants and professionals.

data.title: Solana Mobile plans to introduce its SKR token in January, with a total supply of 10 billion tokens.
data.description: Solana Mobile has announced that the SKR token linked to its Seeker phone is scheduled to be released in the beginning of the upcoming year, with a circulating supply of 10 billion tokens.

data.title: Connecticut orders Kalshi, Robinhood, and Crypto.com to stop 'unlicensed' online gambling for breaching state laws.
data.description: State regulators in Connecticut have recently sent out cease-and-desist letters to platforms, accusing them of providing illegal sports-event contracts to users in the state. The letters were issued as a response to the platforms offering these contracts without proper authorization. The exact number of platforms involved and the extent of the illegal activity have not been disclosed publicly. The regulators are taking action to address the issue and prevent any further unlawful activities in the state.
